all.en: During the long rainy season, I started feeling bored and trapped inside my small apartment.
all.zh: 在漫長的雨季期間，我開始對被困在小公寓裡感到無聊。

all.en: To brighten my balcony, I decided to start a small home gardening project.
all.zh: 為了讓陽台增添生氣，我決定開始一個小型的家庭園藝計畫。

all.en: I visited the local plant shop and bought soil, pots and several types of seeds.
all.zh: 我去了在地的植物店，買了泥土、花盆和好幾種種子。

all.en: The friendly owner recommended easy plants for beginners, such as basil, mint and cherry tomatoes.
all.zh: 親切的店主推薦了適合初學者的容易種植的植物，例如羅勒、薄荷和小番茄。

all.en: I carefully followed her instructions about watering schedules and sunlight requirements.
all.zh: 我仔細遵照她關於澆水時間表和日照需求的指示。

all.en: During the first week, nothing seemed to happen, and I worried that I had failed.
all.zh: 在第一週，似乎什麼動靜也沒有，我擔心自己已經失敗了。

all.en: Then, tiny green sprouts suddenly appeared overnight after a heavy thunderstorm.
all.zh: 接著，在一場大雷雨後的一夜之間，小小的綠色嫩芽突然冒了出來。

all.en: Watching the plants grow taller each day became an unexpected source of daily joy.
all.zh: 看著植物每天長高一些，成了一個出乎意料的日常快樂來源。

all.en: Last weekend, I harvested fresh basil leaves to make homemade pasta sauce.
all.zh: 上個週末，我採收了新鮮的羅勒葉來製作自製的義大利麵醬。

all.en: The flavor of homegrown herbs is far richer than anything sold at the supermarket.
all.zh: 自家種植的香草風味遠遠勝過超市販售的任何香草。

all.en: My balcony has transformed into a tiny green paradise that welcomes me every morning.
all.zh: 我的陽台已蛻變成一座小小的綠色天堂，每天早上都歡迎著我。

all.en: Gardening has taught me patience and the simple satisfaction of nurturing living things.
all.zh: 園藝教會了我耐心，以及照料生命所帶來的單純滿足感。
